surface_verification.justification: Framework-internal merge-driver config: extends the gitattributes merge=union SSoT (gitattributes_union.py) + template + root .gitattributes to two curated agent-docs, plus tests + docs. No web/UI/API application surface and no backend-affects-frontend path. Behavior verified end-to-end by REAL git merges: a parameterized real-git repro over BOTH curated docs proves two concurrent bullet-prepends union without conflict markers (ordered), with a negative control proving the union driver is the mechanism; the full F0 shared suite (3270) + adopt (304) stay green.
